layer_label_zh: 晶圓測試 · 先進 AI 晶片

fy_revenue.vs_street: +10% vs street FY26 (AI test mix lift)

operating_margin.vs_street: +250 bps vs street, AI test time multiplier

non_ai_contribution.note: Smartphone + auto + general-purpose test OP profit

multiple.vs_history: 5y median ≈ 11×; cycle-aware 14× reflects AI mix re-rating

price_target.kill_condition: If AI test handler utilization falls < 80% for two consecutive quarters → exit. AI chips need 3–5× test time of legacy; loss of utilization breaks the margin thesis.

A_ai_exposure.note: AI test estimated 35–45% of FY26 revenue; rising on Blackwell/MI300 ramp.

B_order_visibility.tier: [draft — capex announcements with named customers are the proof]
B_order_visibility.note: Target ★★★★ once handler capex + utilization disclosure confirmed.

C_growth_potential.note: Test time per AI chip 3–5× legacy → revenue per wafer 3–5× even at flat unit volumes.

D_cheap_to_fair.note: Auto-computed from PT vs price; gated by cycle multiplier.

E_increasing_moat.note: Handler capacity for advanced AI chips concentrated — KYEC + Sigurd are the two scaled Taiwan options.

F_revaluation.note: Margin structural step-up is the primary 重估 lever; needs 2 quarters of confirmed margin lift.

customers_named: NVIDIA AI silicon (via TSMC OSAT chain) — public attribution
Broadcom AI ASIC programs — public attribution
order_visibility.capacity_locked: [draft — Teradyne / Advantest handler capex + 苗栗 / 銅鑼 line ramp; analyst to confirm utilization disclosure]

receipts.summary_en: AI test handler capex announcement with named application (Teradyne UltraFLEXplus / Advantest V93000 EXA Scale).
receipts.summary_zh: AI 測試機台資本支出公告 · 名點應用 (Teradyne / Advantest 高階機台)。
receipts.source: 公開資訊觀測站 · 重大訊息 (2449)

receipts.summary_en: Most recent 法說會: AI test mix % + handler utilization % + Q+N visibility quote.
receipts.summary_zh: 最新法說會: AI 測試比重 + 稼動率 + Q+N 訂單能見度。

receipts.summary_en: Teradyne / Advantest equipment shipment data to Taiwan testers + ASE test capex disclosure (disintermediation watch).
receipts.summary_zh: 測試設備 (Teradyne / Advantest) 出貨資料 + ASE 測試資本支出 (in-house 替代風險監控)。

order_visibility.kill: Two consecutive quarters of softer 「AI 測試稼動率」 language → exit. Margin compression > 200 bps without volume offset → cut half.

mechanism.en: [DRAFT ≥600 words required] AI accelerator → 2.5D/3D multi-die package → exhaustive test (probe, burn-in, system-level test, multi-pattern functional). Test time per Blackwell-class GPU runs 3–5× a Hopper-class part and 5–8× a legacy server CPU. Even at flat unit volumes, revenue per wafer at the test step multiplies. Quantify per-NVIDIA-GB200 test-hour content and KYEC's share of the qualified-handler base. Watch ASE/SPIL in-house test capex as the disintermediation risk to the thesis.

moat_widening.en: [DRAFT] Advanced AI test handlers are scarce; 2.5D/3D packages need specialized fixturing + thermal-controlled handlers. KYEC + Sigurd are the two scaled Taiwan options. Quantify share-gain trajectory FY25 → FY28.

revaluation_thesis.en: [DRAFT] Market prices KYEC as a smartphone-cycle test house at ~11× 5-year median. AI test mix lifting GM/OM into a structurally higher band → multiple re-rating once 2 consecutive quarters of margin step-up confirm.

kill_condition.en: AI accelerator design wins shifting to OSAT in-house test (TSMC, ASE expanding test) — disintermediation risk. Watch ASE earnings calls for test capex.

if_kill_then.en: Exit. No good defensive position in test if disintermediation prints — move to substrate (3037) or interconnect.
